LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES APPEARED. ARGUED AND COURT ADOPTED TENTATIVE RULING -- MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT BY MR. CHIATELLO AND MS. PEDOT IS GRANTED, NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE: ALTER EGO LIABILITY FOR EITHER DEFENDANT RE: SHEARWATER. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT BY SOMA IS GANTED, NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE: SOMA'S AGREEMENT TO GUARANTEE THE DEBT OF SHEARWATER. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR 437(C)(H) CONTINUANCE IS DENIED, INADEQUET SHOWING OF ENTITLEMENT TO SUCH CONTINUANCE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HON. A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II. REPORTER: JOYCE LONG CSR# 8620

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Andrew Gary Giacomini, Esq., HANSON BRIDGETT 995-5059, for defendants JOHN CHIATELLO, NANCY PEDOT AND SOMA DEVELOPMENT, LLC moving for summary judgment
Kevin M. Solan, Esq. OTTENWELLER, SOLAN & PARK, LLP 433-1060, for plaintiff Ramirez Developers Inc. dba Pacific Cement and opposing party
* A R G U E D and Court adopted tentative ruling --
Motion for summary judgment by Mr. Chiatello and Ms. Pedot is GRANTED, no
triable issue of fact re: alter ego liability for either defendant re: Shearwater.
Motion for summary judgment by SOMA is GANTED, no triable issue of fact re:
SOMA's agreement to guarantee the debt of Shearwater.
Plaintiff's Request for 437(c)(h) continuance is DENIED, inadequet showing
of entitlement to such continuance.
ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (AJR/301) Hon. A. JAMES ROBERTSON II (301) Joyce Long, CSR 8620
